info.title: Rizquna ERP API Reference
info.description: OpenAPI reference for the Rizquna Publishing platform, author portal, digital library, and administration APIs.

default.description: Protected endpoints require a Laravel Sanctum bearer token in the Authorization header.

BearerAuth.description: Use a Laravel Sanctum bearer token from the login endpoint.

GET /api/v1/auth/google/callback

get.description:
SECURITY FIXES:
1. Prevent account takeover (email enumeration)
2. Use fragment (#) instead of query (?) for token
3. Remove stateless() for CSRF protection

customer_id.description: ID customer percetakan. The id of an existing record in the percetakan_customers table.

product_id.description: ID produk percetakan yang dipesan. The id of an existing record in the percetakan_products table.

quantity.description: Jumlah unit yang dipesan. Must be at least 1.
